display_text: Tidehunter Aghanim's Scepter: Gush becomes a ground-targeted wave ability. This upgrade counters enemy positioning and mobility, allowing Tidehunter to debuff multiple enemies in a line from a safer distance, enhancing his zoning and initiation potential.
search_text: Tidehunter Aghanim Scepter Gush wave ability line debuff positioning mobility zoning initiation

display_text: Tidehunter Aghanim's Shard: Dead in the Water leashes an enemy hero, countering mobility and escape attempts. This transforms Tidehunter into a stronger single-target lockdown hero, enabling better pick-offs and preventing slippery enemies from disengaging.
search_text: Tidehunter Aghanim Shard Dead in the Water leash lockdown mobility counter escape prevention pick-off
